topic: Perfect scrambled eggs & a complete brunch

learner.name: Chris
learner.objective: Make perfect scrambled eggs and serve a complete, reasonably-priced brunch to my family this weekend.
learner.comfort_level: comfortable in the kitchen, comfortable with HTML/CSS, technical user
learner.timeframe: 5 days to first attempt; ongoing for skill-building
learner.preferred_tone: friendly cooking-show host — warm and restrained. No glaze. No verbosity.
learner.engagement_style: magical interactivity matters; embedded demos preferred; experimentation encouraged
learner.favorite_teacher_traits: explains the why before the how, shows real examples, doesn't waste time

design.aesthetic: Garden Manual × Cookbook (summery — eggshell base, butter yellow / tomato / sage / sky / berry accents)

lessons.title: What makes a brunch feel complete
Timing the menu so everything lands warm
Where to splurge, where to save

data_keys.brunch_prices: Per-unit prices for all ingredients (base + upgrade ingredients).
data_keys.brunch_pinned_recipes: Array of pinned recipe ids — additive across eggs + sides.
data_keys.brunch_applied_upgrades: Per-recipe map of upgrade id → bool.
data_keys.brunch_servings: Shared servings count across Pick / Shop / Cook tabs.
data_keys.brunch_cook_mode: 'parallel' or 'sequential' for the Cook tab timeline view.
